---
name: Legal Analysis
about: Raise a legal concern, edge case, or constitutional question
title: "[Legal] "
labels: legal
assignees: ''
---

## Which section does this apply to?

- [ ] Section 1: Qualified Citizenship at Birth
- [ ] Section 2: The 10-Year Path
- [ ] Section 3: No Child Left Stateless
- [ ] Section 4: The Legacy Shield
- [ ] The amendment as a whole
- [ ] Interaction with existing law (14th Amendment, etc.)

## What is the legal concern?

Describe the issue clearly. Include references to existing law or case law if relevant.

## What is your background?

This helps us understand how to weight the feedback. For example: "law student," "immigration attorney," "concerned citizen who read the 14th Amendment." All are welcome.

## Suggested resolution

If you have an idea for how to fix it, include it here.
